name: Trade Results Table
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules p.49
description: Table for determining trade task outcomes and credit rewards

1.narrative: Your trading attempt backfires, costing you resources

2.description: Break even - no profit or loss
2.narrative: You find some trading opportunities but they barely cover expenses

3.narrative: A modest trading opportunity provides a small profit

4.narrative: You find a good trading opportunity and make a decent profit

5.narrative: Excellent trading instincts lead to a profitable day

6.narrative: You strike gold with an exceptional trading opportunity

SAVVY.description: Savvy characters are better at spotting good deals

CONNECTIONS.description: Connections help find better trading partners

trade_goods.description: Having trade goods to start with improves prospects

BACKWATER.description: Limited trading opportunities on backwater worlds

critical_success.description: Exceptional trading success doubles credit rewards

critical_failure.description: Particularly bad trading outcomes cost extra
